title: Moonchild & Brittney Carter Live
location: Cobb Energy Performing Arts Centre, 2800 Cobb Galleria Pkwy
description: Smooth soul and jazz fusion from Moonchild trio plus Brittney Carter. Perfect for couples who love intimate, melodic vibes. Medium dress code.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Laugh together at Atlanta's best local comedians. 21+ venue. Great for a fun, low-pressure date night.

title: ATL Art Gals: Embracing the Frivolous
description: Women-led art social at a beautiful historic venue. Great conversation starter, wine included. Perfect early evening date.

title: Orion Levine at Helium Comedy Club
description: Award-winning local comic. Perfect for couples who appreciate clever, clean humor. Date night heaven.

title: Atlanta One Love Reggae Music Fest
description: Outdoor reggae festival with multiple artists, food trucks, good vibes. Great for couples who love outdoors, music, and dancing under the sky.

title: TUMBAO Dance Social - 2 Rooms Salsa & Bachata
description: Dance social with live performance by Kiara. Two rooms playing salsa and bachata. Lessons included. Dance, mingle, get close.

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Foodie date perfect! Atlanta's ultimate vegan street food festival. Try new dishes together, great Instagram moments, casual romantic vibes.

title: SLOW JAMS ATL - Rooftop R&B Day Party
location: Rose and Rye, North Druid Hills
description: Rooftop day party with slow jams and R&B. Indoor/outdoor space, cocktails, good food. Couples who love music and vibes will love this.

title: Guy Torry at Helium Comedy Club
description: Known for standing out on 'Def Comedy Jam'. Hilarious, energetic show. Great for couples who laugh together.

title: Atlanta Veg Week Kickoff Party
description: Citywide plant-based celebration kickoff at Patagonia. Meet like-minded foodies, sample treats, learn together.

title: Gordon Parks: The South in Color
description: 40+ photographs documenting the Black American South in the 1950s-60s. Intellectually stimulating, great conversation. Cultural couples love this.

title: Open Studios at Atlanta Contemporary
description: Meet 30+ working artists in their studios. Creative inspiration, wine, mingling. Affordable, inspiring, great for curious couples.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest
description: Three stages, Umphrey's McGee + Thievery Corporation headlining. Craft brews, food, games. THE date festival of the year. Buy tickets fast.

title: Spring in Bloom Rooftop Pop-Up
location: St. Julep Rooftop, Kimpton Sylvan Atlanta - Buckhead
description: Floral-themed rooftop bar. Spring cocktails, beautiful decor. Reservations essential. Romantic, Instagram-worthy, great for couples.

title: SweetWater 420 Fest Day 2
description: lespecial, The Moss, Sneezy and more. All-day festival with two stages, craft market, great food. Rain or shine love.
